technique: Internal reconnaissance / AD enumeration before lateral movement

trigger.from_breadth: One account or host running a burst (>=3 distinct) of discovery LOLBins in 4688 command lines within the window (net group / net user / net localgroup, nltest, dsquery, ldifde, csvde, whoami /all, quser, arp -a, ipconfig /all, systeminfo, tasklist, route print, nbtstat), OR a spike in 4662/4661 directory-object reads from one subject. Also chains from a confirmed compromise -> what did the foothold enumerate next?

telemetry_required: 4662 (directory object access) / 4661 (SAM object access) for AD-object enumeration
telemetry_gap_behavior: No Sysmon, so 4688 CommandLine (confirmed collected) is the discovery lens. PowerShell script-block logging is OFF -> AD-module recon (Get-ADUser/Get-NetUser/PowerView) is partly blind; also sweep 4688 for powershell.exe with AD cmdlet hints. Absent telemetry = KNOWN-GAP note + recommendation to enable script-block logging, never clean.

method.query: winlogbeat_winlog_event_id:4688 AND winlogbeat_winlog_channel:Security AND message:("net group" OR "net user" OR "net localgroup" OR "nltest" OR "dsquery" OR "ldifde" OR "csvde" OR "whoami /all" OR "quser" OR "systeminfo" OR "nbtstat" OR "route print")
method.compute: for the entity: distinct discovery tools used, sequence, timing; count distinct = breadth of enumeration
method.decision_input: >=3 distinct discovery tools from one account/host in minutes = active internal recon

method.query: winlogbeat_winlog_event_id:4688 AND message:("domain admins" OR "enterprise admins" OR "net group \"domain admins\"" OR "nltest /domain_trusts" OR "dsquery group")
method.compute: did the entity enumerate privileged groups or domain trusts?
method.decision_input: enumerating Domain Admins / Enterprise Admins / domain trusts = targeting for escalation -> raise severity

method.compute: spike in DS/SAM object reads from one account = bulk AD enumeration (LDAP/ADWS collection)
method.decision_input: high-volume 4662/4661 from a non-admin/non-service account = mass enumeration

method.compute: did recon follow a confirmed compromise of this entity (cred-stuffing / RDP brute / impossible-travel)? did lateral movement FOLLOW the recon?
method.decision_input: compromise -> recon -> lateral = the classic post-exploitation sequence -> escalate the chain to CRITICAL

decision.CRITICAL_conf5: recon burst that follows a confirmed compromise AND precedes lateral movement, or that enumerates Domain/Enterprise Admins + trusts
decision.HIGH_conf4: >=3 distinct discovery tools or a 4662/4661 enumeration spike from one non-admin account with no business reason
decision.MEDIUM_conf3: isolated discovery commands that may be legitimate admin/helpdesk activity - review
decision.FP_kill: admin / helpdesk troubleshooting scripts; monitoring & inventory agents (SCCM, asset tools); login scripts running systeminfo/ipconfig; sanctioned vuln scanners

false_positive_checks: admin/helpdesk accounts running net/whoami/systeminfo during normal support (baseline the account)
SCCM / inventory / monitoring agents that enumerate by design
logon scripts that always run ipconfig/systeminfo

output_findings_json.query_template: winlogbeat_winlog_event_id:4688 AND message:("net group" OR "nltest" OR "dsquery" OR "whoami /all")
